title: 移除重复控制窗口
changes: Remove the duplicate persistent window and keep the menu bar control panel as the single control surface.
Read the displayed version from CFBundleShortVersionString instead of hard-coding an old version.
verification: Swift tests and Universal App build must pass.
The built app should show only one control panel when launched and when the menu bar hand icon is clicked.
notes: This build remains a local candidate until real-device menu bar and permission flow validation is complete.
